title: Avoiding allergens and gluten in food - Canada.ca
content:
## Avoiding allergens and gluten in food
Tips for avoiding common allergens in food.  How to identify allergens and gluten sources on labels of prepackaged foods.

## Services and information

### Avoiding allergic reactions to food
Tips to avoid having an allergic reaction to a food product.

### Allergen and gluten source labelling
How to find common allergens and gluten sources on labels of prepackaged foods.
- Canadian Food Inspection Agency
